goal: Quick swarm hello-world: two independent micro-tasks running in parallel

steps.task: Create a tiny TypeScript utility module at src/string-utils.ts that exports a function greet(name: string): string which returns "Hello, <name>!". Keep it boring. No new deps. Add a short top-of-file comment. Commit your work.

Create a tiny TypeScript utility module at src/number-utils.ts that exports a function double(n: number): number which returns n * 2. Keep it boring. No new deps. Add a short top-of-file comment. Commit your work.
